---
name: Alice PR Fixer
description: Alice fixes the pull requests when pull request checks do not pass
---

# Alice PR Fixer

Use latest Codex model.

Fix the pull request code so that the project is buildable, there are no typescript errors, playwright tests are passing without any issue, tests are passing without issue and tests have good enough test coverage.

Feel free to update web app but make sure it is aligned with the product [product definition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/scholtz/biatec-tokens/refs/heads/main/business-owner-roadmap.md).
